plugin.name: PSD Builder Native
plugin.description: A plugin that builds layered PSD files natively in Kotlin.

capabilities.name: Build PSD from Image and Texts
capabilities.description: Generates a layered PSD natively in Kotlin from an image, texts and bounding boxes

imagePath.description: Path to the base image (JPG, PNG, WebP)

texts.description: List of text strings to render

balloonBoxes.description: List of bounding boxes for each balloon (ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax)

textBoxes.description: List of bounding boxes for each text (ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax)

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psd
outputs.description: Path to the generated PSD file

capabilities.name: Build PSD from Image and Advanced OCR Data
capabilities.description: Generates a layered PSD natively from an image and advanced OCR data

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psd
outputs.description: Path to the generated PSD file

capabilities.name: Build PSD from Image and OCR Data
capabilities.description: Generates a layered PSD natively from an image and basic OCR data

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psd
outputs.description: Path to the generated PSD file

capabilities.name: Build PSD for Chapter
capabilities.description: Generates layered PSDs natively for a folder of images concurrently

inputFolder.description: Path to folder containing chapter images

texts.description: List of text strings to render across all pages

balloonBoxes.description: List of bounding boxes for each balloon (ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax)

textBoxes.description: List of bounding boxes for each text (ymin, xmin, ymax, xmax)

pageNames.description: List of image filenames corresponding to each text

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psds
outputs.description: List of paths to the generated PSD files

capabilities.name: Build PSD for Chapter from Advanced OCR Data
capabilities.description: Generates layered PSDs natively for a folder of images concurrently using advanced OCR data

inputFolder.description: Path to folder containing chapter images

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psds
outputs.description: List of paths to the generated PSD files

capabilities.name: Build PSD for Chapter from OCR Data
capabilities.description: Generates layered PSDs natively for a folder of images concurrently using basic OCR data

inputFolder.description: Path to folder containing chapter images

borderSize.description: Thickness of the text stroke/border (0 to disable)

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Keep intermediate JSON and temp image files for debugging

outputs.name: generated psds
outputs.description: List of paths to the generated PSD files

capabilities.name: Build PSD from JSON
capabilities.description: Generates a layered PSD natively from a given JSON file

baseImagePath.description: Path to base image (optional, default looks in JSON)

outputs.name: generated psd
outputs.description: Path to the generated PSD file

capabilities.name: Extract Text Layers from PSD
capabilities.description: Reads a PSD file and returns a list of text layers with their text, position, and font info.

debugMode.description: Enable debug mode to draw bounding boxes on the output image

paddingPercentage.description: Percentage of the bounding box size to use as padding

Added: setting for padding multiplier in baloons

Changes: minor changes to the centering algorythm to be more accurate
minor changes to the centering algorythm to be more accurate
build from json for chapter and single image update to the new features formats
follow shapes no longer breaks world
Fixed: build psd for chapters would build a single psd

Fixed a JSON decoding exception on plugin initialization by explicitly adding escaped double quotes to string default values (like "Anime Ace 2.0 BB") in capability parameters, ensuring compliance with kotlinx.serialization.

Added: Added new `borderSize` parameter to capabilities, exposing stroke thickness to the UI. Passing 0 removes the border completely.
Added a 3-pixel white outline (stroke) layer effect to all generated text to improve readability over images.
Added spatial text centering functionality to calculate horizontal and vertical offsets automatically inside the bounding boxes.

Fixed: Corrected default font name in PSDBuilderPlugin and main.js from 'Anime ACE 2.0'/'ArialMT' to exactly 'Anime Ace 2.0 BB'.
Fixed 'Invalid host defined options' runtime error for ESM modules by pre-bundling with ncc before pkg compilation.

Changed: Automate pkg compilation directly via Gradle build scripts.
Fixed executable packaging by explicitly bundling Jimp assets to resolve MODULE_NOT_FOUND errors at runtime.

Added: Batch capability to process entire chapters concurrently (max 4 processes via Semaphore).
Smart word-wrapping text generation to fit bounding boxes.
Set "Anime ACE 2.0" as default fallback font.
Changed: Refactored `executeBuilder` to be a coroutine suspend function.
Improved cleanup with safe `try-finally` blocks for temporary JSON files.
Initial: Initial release with PSD Builder capabilities
